steps.title: Establish the area conversion factor
steps.content:
Since 1 meter = 3.28 feet, square both sides to convert area units:
$$1 \text{ square meter} = (3.28)^2 \text{ square feet} = 10.7584 \text{ square feet}$$

steps.title: Convert the rate to square meters per hour
steps.content:
Divide by the conversion factor:
$$\frac{270}{10.7584} \approx 25.089 \text{ square meters per hour}$$

steps.title: Convert per hour to per minute
steps.content:
Divide by 60 to change the time unit:
$$\frac{25.089}{60} \approx 0.418 \text{ square meters per minute}$$
Rounding 0.418 gives 0.42. That matches choice A — A is correct.
